short_description: Download & Save Saintporn Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Saintporn Downloader is a browser extension designed to capture and save videos from SaintPorn video pages. It works by observing network activity during playback to detect and download the media stream, giving you a local MP4 file you can keep, move, or play offline. The extension targets SaintPorn's video page URLs directly, with verified coverage for the main domain, www subdomain, and wildcard subdomains.

faqs.question: What browsers are supported?
faqs.answer: The extension works on Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Firefox. Download the correct build for your browser from the releases page.

faqs.question: Do I need an account to use the extension?
faqs.answer: Yes, you need to sign in with your email using a one-time password. This enables the trial and license system.

faqs.question: How many videos can I download for free?
faqs.answer: You get 3 free downloads to test the extension. After that, a paid license is required for unlimited downloads.

faqs.question: Is my download history tracked?
faqs.answer: The extension does not track or store information about which videos you download. Your activity remains private.

faqs.question: Can I download videos in 4K quality?
faqs.answer: The available quality options depend on what SaintPorn serves during playback. The extension detects whatever streams are present on the page.

why: SaintPorn hosts a large library of adult video content, but the platform does not provide a native download option for its video pages. If you want to save a video for offline viewing, you are left with no built-in way to do it. Screen recording is clunky, reduces quality, and takes up more space than necessary.

Saintporn Downloader solves this by detecting the media stream directly from the page during playback. Instead of recording your screen or relying on third-party sites, you get a clean MP4 file captured from the network layer. The extension is built specifically around SaintPorn video page URLs, with a target-verified handoff profile that has been tested against the site's structure.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open SaintPorn and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Install the Saintporn Downloader extension from the GitHub Releases page.
Navigate to SaintPorn.com and find a video you want to save.
Open the video page and start playback.
Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
Wait for the extension to detect the available media stream.
Select your preferred quality from the options shown.
Click the download button to begin capturing the video.
When the download completes, save the MP4 file to your chosen location.

troubleshooting: The extension does not detect any media on the page Make sure the video is playing before you open the popup. The extension needs to see network activity from the stream to detect it.
The download starts but fails partway through Check your internet connection and try again. A stable connection is required for the entire download process.
The popup does not open when I click the icon Try refreshing the SaintPorn page and clicking the icon again. If the issue persists, reinstall the extension from the latest release.
I see an error about unsupported video format Only videos played directly on SaintPorn video pages are supported. Embedded or external players may not work.
The download is very slow Large video files can take time to download. Make sure you have a fast internet connection and close other bandwidth-heavy applications.
